patch:
--- a/comparator_64bit.v
+++ b/comparator_64bit.v
@@ -1,14 +1,14 @@
 module comparator_64bit(
   input [63:0] value_p,
   input [63:0] value_q,
   input enable,
   output reg equal_flag,
   output reg greater_flag
 );
 
-  always @(value_p) begin
+  always @(value_p or value_q or enable) begin
     if (!enable) begin
       equal_flag = 1'b0;
       greater_flag = 1'b0;
     end else begin
       equal_flag = (value_p == value_q);
       greater_flag = (value_p > value_q);
     end
   end
 endmodule
